scripts.demo:start: npm run demo:seed && concurrently -n server,client-a,client-b,dashboard "npm run dev -w packages/server" "cross-env CB_DEV_ID=devA CB_WORKSPACE=./packages/demo/workspace-devA npm run dev -w packages/client" "cross-env CB_DEV_ID=devB CB_WORKSPACE=./packages/demo/workspace-devB npm run dev -w packages/client" "npm run dev -w packages/dashboard"
scripts.demo:infra: concurrently -n server,dashboard "npm run dev -w packages/server" "npm run dev -w packages/dashboard"
